docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 78381213) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77814274) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAVIER DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2026

DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 77814274) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77814274) TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78055808), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED DEC-15-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAVIER

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $468.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 78381213) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAVIER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAVIER $13,901.59 PRINCIPAL, $1,725.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,165.86 INTEREST, $468.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,260.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
